name: Alien Raid Monster Evolution
author: Poki
description: Alien Raid Monster Evolution is a strategy game where aliens, monsters, and evolution collide in an epic invasion of Earth! Raid cities, gather resources, capture humans, and grow your monstrous army to crush military bases. Create and upgrade powerful creatures using DNA, improve your lab, and unlock stronger evolutions as you push toward world domination. Ready to evolve, invade, and conquer the planet? How to play Alien Raid Monster Evolution? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD, the arrow keys or the joystick to move. Who created Alien Raid Monster Evolution? Alien Raid Monster Evolution is created by Mad Pixel Games LTD. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Alien Raid Monster Evolution for free? You can play Alien Raid Monster Evolution for free on Poki. Can I play Alien Raid Monster Evolution on mobile devices and desktop? Alien Raid Monster Evolution can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
